checkUpkeep(bytes).details: Chainlink Keeper checks if it's time to trigger the payout.

deposit().details: Users deposit their contribution. Can be called directly or via an ERC-4337 Paymaster/Smart Account.

liquidateGroup().details: Fallback mechanism if a member ghosts the group. Can be called by anyone after the grace period to rescue funds.

performUpkeep(bytes).details: Chainlink Keeper triggers the actual payout.
